name: Chicken Soup with Passatelli
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Grated Parmesan cheese, plus extra for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour chicken broth into a large pot and bring to a boil.
2. Add carrots, celery, garlic, and salt. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 30 minutes.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine breadcrumbs, cheese, and nutmeg. Make a well in the center and add eggs; mix until thoroughly combined. The dough should be damp but firm. If necessary, incorporate additional breadcrumbs or a few drops of water; if the dough is too wet or too dry it will crumble.
4. To form the passatelli, pinch off a piece of dough and roll it about 1/4 inch thick. Break it into 1/2 inch lengths. Continue forming the rest of the dough in the same manner.
5. Bring the broth back to a boil, add the passatelli and parsley, and cook for 5 minutes.
6. Ladle the soup into bowls, sprinkle with a little Parmesan, and serve.
